author: Kimeko McCoy
title: What AI disruption means for experimental ad budgets
description: The 2026 ad budget is now a lab experiment as marketers boost experimental budgets for AI and emerging channels.
content: Experimental ad budgets are getting a second look nowadays. AI platforms are rolling out ad products, tried and true channels are more saturated than ever and marketers are desperate to find new audi… [+3829 chars]

author: Michael Bürgi
title: Media Buying Briefing: What will Meta’s and YouTube’s legal losses mean for the marketplace?
description: As Meta and YouTube suffer defeats with damages in court, will media buyers steer clients away from them? Unlikely for now.
